# draw(_:)

**Instance Method**

Draws the screen saver view.

## Declaration

```swift
func draw(_ rect: NSRect)
```

## Discussion

[doc://com.apple.screensaver/documentation/ScreenSaver/ScreenSaverView] implements [doc://com.apple.screensaver/documentation/ScreenSaver/ScreenSaverView/draw(_:)] to draw a black background. Subclasses can do their drawing here or in [doc://com.apple.screensaver/documentation/ScreenSaver/ScreenSaverView/animateOneFrame()].

## Drawing the view

- **isPreview**: A Boolean value that indicates whether the screen saver view is set to a size suitable for previewing its content.
